g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain spectral graph methods and the Laplacian')
sendPrompt('Explain DeepWalk random walks and Skip-gram')
sendPrompt('How does GCN work and how does it evolve from spectral methods?')
sendPrompt('How does GAT attention work in a logistics network?')
sendPrompt('How does GraphSAGE inductive learning work for new nodes?')
sendPrompt('What are TGAT and TGN and how do they handle time?')
sendPrompt('How do hybrid GNN models like DCRNN and STGCN work?')

svg.text: all above: static topology, no time-varying node states
